channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19877] recovery-small: test_51 Error: 'onyx-155vm4 crashed during recovery-small test_51'
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for James Simmons <uja.ornl@gmail.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2043ee4f-a351-4be1-a8a8-be796a5a3cab

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/121685 - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_10.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/121685 - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

[ 2822.643684] Lustre: lustre-MDT0000: Recovery over after 0:02, of 5 clients 0 recovered and 5 were evicted.
[ 2822.662073] BUG: unable to handle kernel NULL pointer dereference at 0000000000000060
[ 2822.663265] PGD 0
[ 2822.663602] Oops: 0000 1 SMP NOPTI
[ 2822.664171] CPU: 0 PID: 108684 Comm: ll_mgs_0001 Kdump: loaded Tainted: G OE -------- - - 4.18.0-553.89.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 #1
[ 2822.666005] Hardware name: Red Hat KVM/RHEL, BIOS 1.16.3-2.el9_5.1 04/01/2014
[ 2822.667055] RIP: 0010:qsd_op_end+0x99/0x340 [lquota]
[ 2822.667867] Code: c7 05 ff 94 05 00 01 00 00 00 48 c7 05 fc 94 05 00 00 00 00 00 e8 c7 e3 18 ff 48 85 db 0f 84 43 02 00 00 48 8b 83 80 00 00 00 <f6> 40 60 02 0f 84 8f 00 00 00 f6 05 4e 12 1a ff 01 0f 84 77 01 00
[ 2822.670548] RSP: 0018:ff28213247467af0 EFLAGS: 00010286
[ 2822.671330] RAX: 0000000000000000 RBX: ff1d81fbb20f8a00 RCX: 0000000000000000
[ 2822.672382] RDX: 0000000000000000 RSI: 0000000000000000 RDI: ff1d81fb87bbaa00
[ 2822.673429] RBP: ff1d81fbad212b90 R08: 00000000000008c8 R09: 0000000000000000
[ 2822.674508] R10: ff1d81fbad462000 R11: ff1d81fbad46186d R12: ff1d81fbad3b5640
[ 2822.675554] R13: ffffffffc14ed300 R14: ffffffffc14f01d8 R15: ff1d81fb86a6f0e0
[ 2822.676603] FS: 0000000000000000(0000) GS:ff1d81fbfba00000(0000) knlGS:0000000000000000
[ 2822.677783] CS: 0010 DS: 0000 ES: 0000 CR0: 0000000080050033
[ 2822.678631] CR2: 0000000000000060 CR3: 0000000136c10005 CR4: 0000000000771ef0
[ 2822.679682] PKRU: 55555554
[ 2822.680115] Call Trace:
[ 2822.680520] ? __die_body+0x1a/0x60
[ 2822.681079] ? no_context+0x1ba/0x3f0
[ 2822.681648] ? __bad_area_nosemaphore+0x157/0x180
[ 2822.682365] ? do_page_fault+0x37/0x12d
[ 2822.682969] ? page_fault+0x1e/0x30
[ 2822.683513] ? qsd_op_end+0x99/0x340 [lquota]
[ 2822.684192] osd_trans_stop+0x363/0xaa0 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 2822.685006] ? srso_alias_return_thunk+0x5/0xfcdfd
[ 2822.685724] ? osd_write+0x148/0x700 [osd_ldiskfs]
[ 2822.686465] mgs_ir_update+0xbf6/0xe40 [mgs]
item.summary: recovery-small: test_51 Error: 'onyx-155vm4 crashed during recovery-small test_51'

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
